description:
## Finding

secretx-pkcs11 module docs include a structured table of supported algorithms and their PKCS#11 mechanisms (lib.rs lines 19–24):

```
| Key type | Algorithm | Mechanism |
|----------|-----------|-----------|
| EC P-256 | EcdsaP256Sha256 | CKM_ECDSA_SHA256 |
| RSA-2048 | RsaPss2048Sha256 | CKM_SHA256_RSA_PKCS_PSS (MGF1-SHA-256, salt=32) |
```

secretx-tpm2 module docs describe the two algorithm options inline in the URI section (lines 8–10) but without an explicit table or mention of the TPM signing scheme parameters (e.g. TPMT_SIG_SCHEME). The algorithm list is also only discoverable from the URI syntax section, not from a standalone "Supported algorithms" heading.

secretx-aws-kms module docs do not include a table either, but the algorithm options are listed in the URI format section.

## Impact

An operator evaluating which backend to use for a given key type cannot quickly compare algorithm support across crates. The PKCS11 table format is the most scannable; the other two force the reader to parse URI syntax documentation to extract algorithm support.

## Locations

- `/home/mark/PROJECT/crate-secretx/secretx-tpm2/src/lib.rs` lines 1–60 (module docs)
- `/home/mark/PROJECT/crate-secretx/secretx-pkcs11/src/lib.rs` lines 1–40 (module docs, includes table)
- `/home/mark/PROJECT/crate-secretx/secretx-aws-kms/src/lib.rs` lines 1–28 (module docs)
title: TPM2 module doc omits supported algorithms table, unlike PKCS11
